club.name: Centennial Leo Club
club.about1: Leading with pride and excellence since foundation.
club.about2: Awarded Most Outstanding School Leo Club.
club.missionTitle:
Leading The Way
For A Better Tomorrow
club.missionStatement: To provide students with an opportunity for development and contribution, individually and collectively, as responsible members of the local, national and international community.

affiliatedBodies.label: GOVERNING BODY
affiliatedBodies.title: Leo District 306 D8
affiliatedBodies.description: Leo District 306 D8 is the governing body for the Leos of the South, overseeing a network of 16 Leo Clubs across the Southern Province. Guided by the theme "Leading with Humanity," and the dedicated leadership of District President Leo Anushka Liyanage, the District coordinates inter-club collaborations, impactful service projects, and mentorship for Leos to create lasting social chang

affiliatedBodies.label: OUR ALMA MATER
affiliatedBodies.title: Richmond College
affiliatedBodies.description: Founded in 1876 by Rev. George Baugh, Richmond College, Galle, is a premier national school celebrating 150 years of excellence this year. As the home of our Leo Club, the College instills a 150-year legacy of discipline and "Nisi Dominus Frustra" (Unless the Lord wills, in vain is the effort). We carry forward this rich heritage of excellence through every act of service we perfor

affiliatedBodies.label: GLOBAL MOVEMENT
affiliatedBodies.title: LEO MOVEMENT
affiliatedBodies.description: Sponsored by Lions Clubs International, the Leo Movement is the world’s largest youth-led service organization, spanning over 140 countries. Built on the pillars of Leadership, Experience, and Opportunity, it empowers youth aged 12 to 30 to serve their communities while fostering global fellowship. Through diverse social service initiatives, Leos transform today’s volunteers into the responsible leaders of tomorrow.

affiliatedBodies.label: GOVERNING BODY
affiliatedBodies.title: Leo Multiple District 306
affiliatedBodies.description: Leo Multiple District 306 is the governing body overseeing 12 Leo Districts across Sri Lanka and the Maldives. Since the movement’s island-wide inception in 1969, the Council has unified over 200 clubs to foster leadership and service excellence. It provides a strategic framework for thousands of young leaders to collaborate, share resources, and create a collective national impact.

affiliatedBodies.label: Governing Body
affiliatedBodies.title: Sponsoring Lions Club
affiliatedBodies.description: The Lions Club of Galle Karapitiya, inaugurated in 2011,  has been the dedicated sponsor and mentor of our Leo Club since our inauguration in 2016. Under the 2025/2026 leadership of President Lion Lakma Kithmini MJF MAF, the Club provides the essential guidance and "We Serve" spirit that empowers our members to lead with purpose. Their steadfast support forms the foundation of our success, helping us create a lasting positive impact in our community.
